item.title: From Disciple to Apostles - Luke 9:1-10
item.dc:creator: Fillmore Christian
item.description: Do you ever feel pressure to share the Gospel? What if that pressure that forces sharing could turn to joy?Ã‚Â
item.itunes:subtitle: Do you ever feel pressure to share the Gospel? What if that pressure that forces sharing could turn to joy?Ã‚Â

item.title: The Words of Eternal Life
item.dc:creator: Fillmore Christian
item.description: In the second half of Luke 8, Jesus miraculously addresses the needs of people who come to him after exhausting all other options and find in the words of Peter, "Where else can we go?Ã‚Â Only you have the words of eternal life.
item.itunes:subtitle: In the second half of Luke 8, Jesus miraculously addresses the needs of people who come to him after exhausting all other options and find in the words of Peter, "Where else can we go?Ã‚Â Only you have the words of eternal life.

item.title: Put on the Lord Jesus Christ
item.dc:creator: Fillmore Christian
item.description: We are called to put on the Lord Jesus, to conform to his image or to impersonate him.Ã‚Â God is at work to make us like him but we are also called to actively work with him.Ã‚Â The Holy Spirit is within us to guide us into Christ-likeness. We also need to actively put on the mind of Christ which we get from Scripture.Ã‚Â Ã‚Â
item.itunes:subtitle: We are called to put on the Lord Jesus, to conform to his image or to impersonate him.Ã‚Â God is at work to make us like him but we are also called to actively work with him.Ã‚Â The Holy Spirit is within us to guide us into Christ-likeness. We also need to actively put on the mind of Christ which we get from Scripture.Ã‚Â Ã‚Â
item.content:encoded: We are called to put on the Lord Jesus, to conform to his image or to impersonate him.Ã‚Â God is at work to make us like him but we are also called to actively work with him.Ã‚Â The Holy Spirit is within us to guide us into Christ-likeness. We also need to actively put on the mind of Christ which we get from Scripture.Ã‚Â Ã‚Â
item.itunes:summary: We are called to put on the Lord Jesus, to conform to his image or to impersonate him.Ã‚Â God is at work to make us like him but we are also called to actively work with him.Ã‚Â The Holy Spirit is within us to guide us into Christ-likeness. We also need to actively put on the mind of Christ which we get from Scripture.Ã‚Â Ã‚Â

We also need to actively put on the mind of Christ which we get from Scripture.Ã‚Â Ã‚Â
